heading: Today
text: Clouds giving way to some sun. A stray shower or storm. Very warm, humid.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Periods of clouds, patchy fog. A stray shower or storm. Muggy.

heading: Friday
text: Partly sunny, hot and humid. Chance of a shower or storm.

heading: Saturday
text: Chance of morning showers, mainly east.
temperature: Upper 70s to upper 80s, north to south
